description: An About page introducing Mateo with bio, mission, and values

userStories.title: About Page Hero Section
userStories.description: Create an About page at src/app/about/page.tsx with a hero section featuring Mateo's name, tagline, and brief bio introduction
acceptanceCriteria: Hero section with Mateo's name in brand gradient

userStories.title: Mission and Values Section
userStories.description: Add a section below the hero that outlines the mission/purpose and core values, using cards or a clean list layout
acceptanceCriteria: 2-4 core values displayed in cards or list
Uses existing Card component if appropriate

userStories.title: Add About to Navigation
userStories.description: Add an 'About' link to the site header navigation between Home and other links
acceptanceCriteria: About link appears in header navigation
